docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, JACQUELINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, JACQUELINE
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $5,007.03 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, JACQUELINE
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, JACQUELINE NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, JACQUELINE $5,036.00 PRINCIPAL, $5,007.03 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,043.03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, JACQUELINE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,036.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
